name: Counterparts and Electronic Execution
text: This Agreement may be executed in multiple counterparts, each of which shall be deemed an original, and all counterparts together shall constitute one instrument.
title: Counterparts

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Aadhaar-based e-KYC signatures have highest evidentiary value under IT Act

dispute_hotspots: Whether PDF email counts as electronic signature — depends on IT Act compliance
Stamped documents — electronic execution may not satisfy stamp duty in some states
